commits: d5bfc04: fix(security): prevent credential leakage and same-origin trust break in proxy
summary: TDD implementation complete for Issue #395. Added SENSITIVE_REQUEST_HEADERS (7 headers) and SENSITIVE_RESPONSE_HEADERS (11 headers) constants to proxy config. Updated proxyHttp() to strip sensitive headers from both requests and responses. Fixed proxyWebSocket() to remove directUrl field and internal URL from response. Fixed route.ts error responses to use fixed-string messages. Added security warning banner to ExternalAppForm. 27 new tests added, 2 existing tests updated. All 4381 tests pass. TypeScript and ESLint checks clean.
